subcodes.first_line: O thou who dost supplicate unto God! Thy letter from Beirut was received. The journey by way of Iraq-i-'Arab is favourable, and thou must proceed to Baghdad [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مبتهل الی الله نامه بیروت وصول یافت سفر از راه عراق عرب موافق و باید در بغداد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @chastisement and requital
